title: UserResponseContractValidationOut
description: Schema for the JSON object returned by prompts/user_response_contract_validator_prompt.md. Mirrors UserResponseContractValidationOut in crates/clawd/src/fallback.rs.

satisfies_contract.description: True when the candidate reply follows the structured user response contract.

false_claims.description: True when the candidate reply claims unsupported facts, capabilities, success, paths, command output, or permissions.

asks_for_missing_target.description: True when the reply asks for the missing target/scope/path/confirmation/information needed to continue.

mentions_internal_details.description: True when the reply exposes implementation-only details such as prompt/schema/fallback labels, task ids, raw provider errors, or stack traces.
